raw_title: Book Review: ‘This Vast Enterprise,’ by Craig Fehrman.
description: In “This Vast Enterprise,” Craig Fehrman refreshes a familiar story with a rich chorus of voices.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘When We See You Again,’ by Rachel Goldberg-Polin
book_title: ‘When We See You Again,’ by Rachel Goldberg-Polin
description: Rachel Goldberg-Polin’s precise and devastating memoir chronicles the 328 days her son was held hostage in Gaza, and what came after.
